reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de un tal Jordan, no quiso cargar puntos de YPF. Muy antipatico. A toda costa queria cargarme INFINIA. UNA PORQUERÍA LA ATENCIÓN!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from a guy named Jordan. He refused to add YPF points to my account. Very unfriendly. He desperately wanted me to add Infinia fuel. The service was awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwRExWUm1WM2hmYWtWbWJscFlOR3hIUkZvMmVFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios. Buenísima la atención adentro donde podés comprar y  tomar algo.
El precio de la nafta caro pero soportable estás viajando 🚙

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean. The service inside was excellent, and you can buy things and have a drink.
Gasoline is expensive, but manageable when you're traveling by car.

reviews.comment:
Paramos a descansar un rato y estaba llenísimo, tanto para cargar combustible como para comprar en el sector de kiosko y comidas. No es una YPF full asi que particularmente no la elijo para comprar el almuerzo.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to rest for a while and it was packed, both for refueling and for buying things at the kiosk and food area. It's not a full-service YPF, so I wouldn't usually choose it for lunch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wb1MwUkNNbXByY0Zkd00ycDBSMlJLUjJkdFZGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Consulta abran pasado a dejar una valija gris, se cayó de la camioneta entre uscudu y garayalde

(Translated by Google)
I'm checking if they've dropped off a gray suitcase; it fell out of the truck between Uscudu and Garayalde.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WTFoxcFZjSEJ3UlhSdmNHUmlaakZEV1hWbFZtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Dice que es 24hs y esta cerrado a las 23hs, una sola cosa tienen que hacer, y la hacen mal. Para ser que esta en el medio de la nada y cierre de noche, hay que ser paparulo ee

(Translated by Google)
It says it's open 24 hours but it closes at 11 PM. There's only one thing they need to do, and they're doing it wrong. To be in the middle of nowhere and close at night, you have to be a complete idiot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psS2JWVm9jRWhvY0hCak5tbzJlREYwTkdoWlVsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños nunca tienen agua. No se si será por la alta demanda, pero no te podes ni lavar las manos.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms never have water. I don't know if it's because of the high demand, but you can't even wash your hands.
